parameters.query:
SELECT 
    a.Af_codigo AS codigoAf,
    a.Af_valor_af AS valorAf,
    a.Af_valor_comissao_empresa,
    a.Af_bonus_empresa,

    a.fil_codigo,
    f.fil_descricao AS Filial,
    
    o.Orgav_codigo,
    o.Orgav_descricao AS orgao

FROM dbo.af a
JOIN dbo.representante r ON a.Rep_codigo = r.Rep_codigo
JOIN dbo.representante r2 ON r.Rep_superior = r2.Rep_codigo
JOIN dbo.convenio c ON a.Con_codigo = c.Con_codigo
JOIN dbo.filial f ON a.fil_codigo = f.fil_codigo
JOIN dbo.produto p ON a.prd_codigo = p.prd_codigo
JOIN dbo.orgaoav o ON p.Orgav_codigo = o.Orgav_codigo

WHERE 
    CAST(a.Af_data AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(DAY, -0, GETDATE()) AS DATE)
    AND a.faf_codigo IN (2, 3, 10, 58, 59, 60, 62, 72, 93, 94);

parameters.content:
